name: stackra/entitlements
purpose: Per-tenant quota + usage tracking substrate — Entitlement + EntitlementUsage aggregates gate every metered feature with slot, pool, boolean, or unlimited kinds.
capabilities: Entitlement aggregate — resolved cap per (tenant, key)
EntitlementUsage audit rows for consumption events
Four entitlement kinds: slot, pool, boolean, unlimited
Redis-backed hot-path consume() with Postgres source-of-truth
Usage-based billing export via Cashier reportUsage
when_to_use: A feature must enforce per-tenant caps or track metered usage that maps to plan quotas or usage-based invoicing.
when_not_to_use: For feature-visibility flags without quota semantics, use stackra/feature-flags. For pricing definitions, use stackra/subscription.
